sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ هَلَا حِذَاءً جَمِيلًا فِي وَاجِهَةِ المَحَلِّ.
sentences.translation: Hela je vidjela lijepe cipele u izlogu prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: Hala saw a beautiful pair of shoes in the shop window.

sentences.translation: Ušla je i pitala prodavačicu za cijenu.
sentences.translationEn: She went in and asked the saleswoman about the price.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السِّعْرُ أَكْثَرَ مِمَّا عِنْدَهَا مِنْ نُقُودٍ.
sentences.translation: Cijena je bila više nego što je imala novca.
sentences.translationEn: The price was more than she had money.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَدَّخِرَ حَتَّى تَشْتَرِيَ الحِذَاءَ لَاحِقًا.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da uštedi kako bi kasnije kupila cipele.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to save up to buy the shoes later.

sentences.translation: Nakon dvije sedmice kupila ih je sretna.
sentences.translationEn: After two weeks she bought them, feeling happy.
